tracks.rawText: 4:55Te_pienso_-_Belari_Video_Oficial_f-49XroBPDsv4.5+Cover[Verse 1] In the silent so low, I chew to your voice And the distance I’m low-seen the reason, no choice Imaginando you’re never, you stay con-migo (oh-oh) Enter secrets, we disguise all the agony-ah And I teen-so you cada día, no reason Dreaming morrow, memory flow and the (oh-oh) [Chorus] Tee-think-so Cada vez that you pass por mi mind-mento Me peer-do In the morrow, in your adiós I go [Verse 2] Debo think I no puedo equivocar Que the estrellas sí se pueden regresar Enfermo, enfermo, enfermo por ti Suelo think, puedo imagine-ar My mente contigo wanna volar Juntando stories that I wanna contar Y the world poder mostrar [Chorus] Tee-think-so, me peer-do, enfermo por ti Mirando your rostro, resisting to be Tee-think-so, me peer-do, enfermo por ti (ah) Tee-think-so Cada vez that you pass por mi mind-mento Me peer-do In the morrow, in your adiós I go [Bridge] Tee-think-so, me peer-do, enfermo por ti Tee-think-so, me peer-do, enfermo por ti Mirando your rostro, resisting to be (oh-oh-o1PublishRemix
